heading: Training and advising civilian law enforcement officials
label: 273 Training and advising civilian law enforcement officials

Amendments2016— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–328section 373 of this title1988— amended section generally, substituting provisions authorizing Secretary of Defense, in accordance with applicable law, to make Defense Department personnel available for training, etc., for former subsecs. (a) to (c) authorizing Secretary of Defense to assign members of Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps, etc., for training, etc., briefing sessions by Attorney General, and other functions of Attorney General and Administrator of General Services.Pub. children.text: to train Federal, State, and local civilian law enforcement officials in the operation and maintenance of equipment, including equipment made available under section 372 of this title; and1See References in Text note below.1
to provide such law enforcement officials with expert advice relevant to the purposes of this chapter.
